
---
format: html
title: "Contacts" 
---

## BioHUG

For more information about the project, please contact the BioHUG research project team xxxxxx.

For more information about donating your medical samples and data to research please see the [General consent page](https://www.hug.ch/aider-recherche){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"} including additional questions [here](https://www.hug.ch/consentement-general-pour-recherche/vos-questions-frequentes-sur-consentement-general-pour){target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
